'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=33B6BQ27s.yq6HsoK0enaGZm7NlGIpset7XAQV6oiIU-1773445949-1.0.1.1-CIa_LkUZmX.ro8RUlp9Fm6wCVwzT2lx7NwuafoZsRG0"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
